zh.Valenciennes, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais,: 法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯諾爾德瓦倫希恩斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Baudouin IV de Hainaut於1108年11月22日出生在比利時海瑙特蒙斯時，他的父親Baudouin III de HAINAUT20歲，母親Yolande von Geldern-Wassenberg20歲。他於1130年與Alice de Namur comtesse de Hainaut在比利時納姆爾結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1171年11月8日在法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯諾爾德瓦倫希恩斯享年62歲，埋葬在比利時海瑙特蒙斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Baudouin IV de Hainaut于1108年11月22日出生在比利时海瑙特蒙斯时，他的父亲Baudouin III de HAINAUT20岁，母亲Yolande von Geldern-Wassenberg20岁。他于1130年与Alice de Namur comtesse de Hainaut在比利时納姆爾结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1171年11月8日在法国諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯諾爾德瓦倫希恩斯享年62岁，埋葬在比利时海瑙特蒙斯。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Baudouin
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: IV
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Vivian   and   Vivien .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: When Baudouin IV de Hainaut was born on 22 November 1108, in Mons, Hainaut, Belgium, his father, Baudouin III de HAINAUT, was 20 and his mother, Yolande von Geldern-Wassenberg, was 20. He married Alice de Namur comtesse de Hainaut in 1130, in Namur, Belgium. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 5 daughters. He died on 8 November 1171, in Valenciennes, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, at the age of 62, and was buried in Mons, Hainaut, Belgium.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Baudouin IV de Hainaut est né le 22 novembre 1108, à Mons, Hainaut, Belgique, son père, Baudouin III de HAINAUT, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Yolande von Geldern-Wassenberg, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Alice de Namur comtesse de Hainaut en 1130, à Namur, Belgique. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé le 8 novembre 1171, à Valenciennes, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, à l’âge de 62 ans, et a été enterré à Mons, Hainaut, Belgique.

de.Hainaut, Spanish Netherlands, Holy Roman: Hainaut, Spanische Niederlande, Heiliges Römisches Reich
de.lifeSummary: Als Baudouin IV de Hainaut am 22. November 1108 in Mons, Hennegau, Belgien geboren wurde, war sein Vater Baudouin III de HAINAUT 20 und seine Mutter Yolande von Geldern-Wassenberg 20. Er hat 1130 in Namen, Belgien Alice de Namur comtesse de Hainaut geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb am 8. November 1171 im Alter von 62 Jahren in Valenciennes, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich und wurde in Mons, Hennegau, Belgien begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Baudouin IV de Hainaut è nato il il 22 novembre 1108 nel Mons, Hainaut, Belgio, il suo padre, Baudouin III de HAINAUT, aveva 20 anni e il suo madre, Yolande von Geldern-Wassenberg, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Alice de Namur comtesse de Hainaut nel 1130, nel Namur, Belgio. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 8 novembre 1171, nel Valenciennes, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, all'età di 62 anni, e fu sepolto a Mons, Hainaut, Belgio.

ja.lifeSummary: Baudouin IV de Hainautが1108年11月22日にベルギーヘイナトモンスで生まれた時，父Baudouin III de HAINAUTは20歳，母Yolande von Geldern-Wassenbergは20歳であった。1130年にベルギーナムルでAlice de Namur comtesse de Hainautと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1171年11月8日にフランスノード-プアス-デ-カレイスノードベレンシエンスで62歳で死去し，ベルギーヘイナトモンスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Baudouin IV de Hainaut(이)가 1108년 11월 22일 벨기에 하인오트 몬스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Baudouin III de HAINAUT(은)는 20세였고, 그의 어머니 Yolande von Geldern-Wassenberg(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1130년 벨기에 남어에서 Alice de Namur comtesse de Hainaut(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1171년 11월 8일 프랑스 노르드-파스-데-캘레이 노르드 발시네스에서 62세의 나이로 사망했으며 벨기에 하인오트 몬스에 묻혔다.

pt.Hainaut, Spanish Netherlands, Holy Roman: Hainaut, Pays-bas espagnols, Heiliges Römisches Reich
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Baudouin IV de Hainaut nasceu em 22 de novembro de 1108, em Mons, Hainaut, Bélgica, seu pai, Baudouin III de HAINAUT, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Yolande von Geldern-Wassenberg, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice de Namur comtesse de Hainaut em 1130, em Namur, Bélgica. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em 8 de novembro de 1171, em Valenciennes, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, França, com 62 anos, e foi sepultado em Mons, Hainaut, Bélgica.

ru.Hainaut, Spanish Netherlands, Holy Roman: ханаут, пеис-бас эспагнолс, хилигесь рoмищесь раич
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Baudouin IV de Hainaut родился 22 ноября 1108 г. в местности монс, ханаут, Бельгия, его отцу по имени Baudouin III de HAINAUT было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Yolande von Geldern-Wassenberg, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice de Namur comtesse de Hainaut в 1130 г. в местности намур, Бельгия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Он умер 8 ноября 1171 г. в местности веиленсиеннесь, норд, норд-пас-де-калеи, Франция в возрасте 62 лет и был похоронен в местности монс, ханаут, Бельгия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Baudouin IV de Hainaut nació el 22 de noviembre de 1108, en Mons, Hainaut, Bélgica, su papá, Baudouin III de HAINAUT, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Yolande von Geldern-Wassenberg, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Alice de Namur comtesse de Hainaut en 1130, en Namur, Bélgica. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 8 de noviembre de 1171, en Valenciennes, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, a la edad de 62 años, y fue sepultado en Mons, Hainaut, Bélgica.
